---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a feature with rationale and acceptance criteria
title: "[FEATURE] <one-line summary>"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-design"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

<!-- What user pain motivates this feature? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- High-level sketch. Don't write code; describe shape. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you weigh? -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Specific, testable outcomes. -->

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Affected surface area

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] Core API (`operatoros-core`)
- [ ] Module contract
- [ ] Preset contract
- [ ] Documentation (which page?)
- [ ] Export modules (which target?)
- [ ] Security model
- [ ] Governance

## Backwards compatibility

<!-- Does this break existing users? If yes, how do we migrate them? -->

## Effort estimate

<!-- Rough bucket: hours / days / weeks. Not exact. -->

## Notes

<!-- Anything else. -->
